NAVAREA XIX 76/23
 GREENLAND SEA 
 WEST OF SVALBARD
 FROM 13 JUNE KL 1200 UTC 2023 TO 28 JUNE 2400 UTC 2023 SURVEY VESSEL CABLE VIGILANCE- FMQW  ARE CONDUCTING SUBMARINE TELECOM CABLE OPERATIONS USING ROV
 SURVEY VESSEL WILL OPERATE ALONG A TRACK BOUNDED BY :
  
 N78-20.3 E009-28.9
 N77-57.5 E008-02.7
  
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 1 NM FROM SURVEY VESSEL AND MOORED CABLE MARKING BOUYS.
 SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 16 AND 72.
